task_completion.description: Open the Sygic GPS Navigation application
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Sygic app is open, displaying its main map interface or startup screen.

task_completion.description: Access the main menu in the Sygic app
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main navigation drawer or menu of the Sygic app is open.
The 'Settings' screen of the Sygic app is visible.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Voice or Regional settings
task_completion.visual_evidence: A settings sub-menu related to 'Voice', 'Language', 'Regional', or 'Notifications & Sounds' is displayed.

task_completion.description: Open the list of available voice guidance languages
task_completion.visual_evidence: A list of downloadable or selectable voices/languages is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Select German (Deutsch) as the voice guidance language
task_completion.visual_evidence: The language 'Deutsch' or 'German' is explicitly selected, indicated by a checkmark, radio button, or displayed as the currently active voice.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface instead of terminal commands
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal emulators (like Termux) or command-line interfaces visible editing shared preferences directly.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Sygic application
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots must show the genuine Sygic GPS Navigation app interface, not a web browser, app store, or text editor.

integrity.description: The language change was made in the actual settings menu
integrity.visual_evidence: The selection of 'Deutsch' or 'German' must occur within a settings list or menu, not just typed into a random search bar or text field.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target voice language to be selected is 'Deutsch' (or 'German'). The agent must achieve this through the Sygic app's graphical user interface.
